none.$description: Blur/0: backdrop blur disabled. Themes without glass surfaces (material3) alias the component backdrop blur here.

24.$description: MarsUI Blur/24: backdrop-filter blur radius used by component effects.

2.$description: MarsUI Elevation/e2 layer geometry: 3px offset/blur (also the Component_effect inner-highlight offset/blur).

effect-y.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/secondary drop and inner-highlight offset: 2px.

primary-default.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/primary_default inner highlight: inset White/12 0/3/3.

primary-hover.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/primary_hover inner highlight: inset White/18 0/3/3.

secondary-default.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/secondary_default inner highlight: inset White/3 0/2/3.

secondary-hover.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/secondary_hover inner highlight: inset White/8 0/2/3.

xxs.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space). Floating hint surfaces such as tooltips.

xs.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space). Small floating surfaces such as listboxes.

sm.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space).

md.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space).

lg.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space).

xl.$description: Surface size scale (MarsUI brief: sizes for large surfaces in rem, decoupled from ki.space).

palette.$description: Material 3 baseline reference tonal palettes (md.ref.palette.*), standard tones 0-100. The primary palette already ships as the material3 brand ramp.

neutral.$description: M3 md.ref.palette.neutral (baseline). Standard tones only; the extended surface tones (4, 6, 12, 17, 22, 24, 87, 92, 94, 96, 98) stay in the migrated material3 primitives.

state-layer.$description: M3 state-layer colors: md.sys.state.{hover,focus,pressed,dragged}.state-layer-opacity (8% / 12% / 12% / 16%) of md.sys.color.on-surface (light #1d1b20 = neutral10, dark #e6e0e9 = neutral90). Pressed shares the focus value (both 12%).

typescale.$description: M3 baseline type scale (md.sys.typescale.*), px compiled to rem/em. Role weights: display/headline/title-large/body use regular (400); title-medium/title-small/label use medium (500). The display-extended-* steps are a Kimen extension beyond display-large (M3 defines no larger role) so the ki display-1..3 hierarchy survives in the M3 rhythm.

display-extended-1.$description: Kimen extension beyond M3 display-large (64px; M3 ends at 57px).

tracking.$description: M3 md.sys.typescale.<role>.tracking compiled from px to em at the role size.

bold.$description: M3 md.ref.typeface.weight-bold (emphasis only; no baseline role uses it).

elevation.$description: M3 baseline elevation (md.sys.elevation.level1-5): a key shadow (black 30%) plus an ambient shadow (black 15%). M3 dark keeps the same shadow geometry and expresses elevation through surface tint instead.

key-color.$description: M3 key (umbra) shadow color: md.sys.color.shadow (#000000) at 30%.

ambient-color.$description: M3 ambient (penumbra) shadow color: md.sys.color.shadow (#000000) at 15%.

emphasized.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.easing.emphasized (cubic-bezier approximation of the emphasized path).

moderate.$description: MarsUI motion scale: 2x the 120ms base, for medium transitions.

slow.$description: MarsUI motion scale: 3x the 120ms base, for large or emphatic transitions.

in.$description: MarsUI accelerate curve: mirror of ki.easing.out (CSS ease-in).
